diff --git a/AGENTS.md b/AGENTS.md
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..ee13290c5
--- /dev/null
+++ b/AGENTS.md
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+# Vue Core Repository - Agent Memory
+
+## Repository Structure
+- `packages/compiler-core/` - Core template compiler (AST, transforms, codegen)
+- `packages/compiler-dom/` - DOM-specific compiler transforms
+- `packages/compiler-sfc/` - SFC (Single-File Component) compiler
+- `packages/runtime-core/` - Core runtime (reactivity, vnode, scheduler)
+- `packages/runtime-dom/` - DOM runtime
+- `packages/shared/` - Shared utilities
+
+## Build-time Constants
+- `__BROWSER__` - `true` in browser build, `false` elsewhere (tests use `false`)
+- `__DEV__` - `true` in development mode
+- `__SSR__` - `true` for SSR builds
+- These are declared in `packages/global.d.ts` and set in `vitest.config.ts`
+
+## Key Transforms
+- `transformVBindShorthand.ts` - Handles same-name shorthand (`:arg` → `:arg="arg"`)
+  - Runs as a NodeTransform BEFORE DirectiveTransforms
+- `vBind.ts` - DirectiveTransform for `v-bind` with arg
+
+## Bug Fix: v-bind Same-Name Shorthand in In-DOM Templates (v3.5.22)
+**File**: `packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/transformVBindShorthand.ts`
+
+**Root Cause**: In browser in-DOM templates, browsers normalize HTML attributes: `:param` (no value) is parsed as `:param=""` (empty string value). When `transformVBindShorthand.ts` only checked `!prop.exp` (null/undefined), it missed the browser-normalized empty string case. This caused `vBind.ts` to set `exp = undefined` and then crash at `createObjectProperty(arg, exp!)`.
+
+**Fix**: In `transformVBindShorthand.ts`, additionally treat empty string expressions as same-name shorthands when `__BROWSER__` is `true`.
+
+```typescript
+(!prop.exp ||
+  // in-DOM templates, the browser parses :arg as :arg="" (empty string)
+  (__BROWSER__ &&
+    prop.exp.type === NodeTypes.SIMPLE_EXPRESSION &&
+    !prop.exp.content.trim()))
+```
+
+The `__BROWSER__` guard preserves non-browser behavior where `v-bind:arg=""` (explicit empty) is an error.
+
+## Testing
+- Tests run: `pnpm test --project=unit packages/compiler-core/__tests__/transforms/vBind.spec.ts`
+- All tests use `__BROWSER__ = false` (set in `vitest.config.ts`)
+- Browser-specific behavior can only be tested in actual browser builds
diff --git a/packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/transformVBindShorthand.ts b/packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/transformVBindShorthand.ts
index ff5b51047..51167db2d 100644
--- a/packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/transformVBindShorthand.ts
+++ b/packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/transformVBindShorthand.ts
@@ -15,7 +15,11 @@ export const transformVBindShorthand: NodeTransform = (node, context) => {
       if (
         prop.type === NodeTypes.DIRECTIVE &&
         prop.name === 'bind' &&
-        !prop.exp
+        (!prop.exp ||
+          // in-DOM templates, the browser parses :arg as :arg="" (empty string)
+          (__BROWSER__ &&
+            prop.exp.type === NodeTypes.SIMPLE_EXPRESSION &&
+            !prop.exp.content.trim()))
       ) {
         const arg = prop.arg!
         if (arg.type !== NodeTypes.SIMPLE_EXPRESSION || !arg.isStatic) {
diff --git a/reproduce.ts b/reproduce.ts
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..68de0ac75
--- /dev/null
+++ b/reproduce.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+// Reproduction script for v-bind same-name shorthand in in-DOM templates
+// In the browser, :param gets parsed as :param="" (with empty string value)
+// This should still trigger the same-name shorthand expansion
+
+import { NodeTypes, baseParse as parse, transform } from './packages/compiler-core/src'
+import { transformBind } from './packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/vBind'
+import { transformElement } from './packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/transformElement'
+import { transformVBindShorthand } from './packages/compiler-core/src/transforms/transformVBindShorthand'
+import type { ElementNode, VNodeCall, ObjectExpression } from './packages/compiler-core/src'
+
+function parseWithVBind(template: string): ElementNode {
+  const ast = parse(template)
+  transform(ast, {
+    nodeTransforms: [transformVBindShorthand, transformElement],
+    directiveTransforms: {
+      bind: transformBind,
+    },
+  })
+  return ast.children[0] as ElementNode
+}
+
+// Test 1: Non-browser case - `:param` without value (this is the regular case)
+console.log('Test 1: :param without value (regular shorthand)')
+try {
+  const node = parseWithVBind(`<div :param />`)
+  const props = (node.codegenNode as VNodeCall).props as ObjectExpression
+  console.log('  Result:', JSON.stringify(props.properties[0], null, 2))
+  console.log('  PASS')
+} catch (e) {
+  console.log('  FAIL:', e)
+}
+
+// Test 2: Browser in-DOM case - `:param=""` (browser parses :param as :param="")
+// This simulates what the browser does when it parses in-DOM templates
+console.log('\nTest 2: :param="" (simulating browser in-DOM template parsing)')
+try {
+  const node = parseWithVBind(`<div :param="" />`)
+  const props = (node.codegenNode as VNodeCall).props as ObjectExpression
+  console.log('  Result:', JSON.stringify(props.properties[0], null, 2))
+  console.log('  PASS')
+} catch (e) {
+  console.log('  FAIL:', e)
+}
